PRE-RELEASE PATCH NOTES (UPDATE 5)

Posted by Hytale Team April 2, 2026

Hi, everyone! We are currently working hard on several parts of Hytale's fifth update.

If you encounter any bugs, you can report them via the in-game bug reporter.

Pre-Release (Update 5, Part 5)

April 23, 2026

Headline Features

  • Combined the Extrude and Flood Tools into a reworked Extrude Tool.

Modding & Creative Tools

  • Added initial tech support to enable falling blocks.

Pre-Release (Update 5, Part 4)

April 16, 2026
